calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: INV-074/MECH-334/MECH-333 crystallization-necessity TRUE-NEGATIVE-CONTROL retest (+MECH-341/313 floor contrast): strip the always-on diversity floor (noise_floor/E3-diversity/dACC-suppression off; structured curiosity decoupled from crystallize) so crystallization is the SOLE phase-3 diversity route in ARM_1; phase-dependent entropy bonus (0.02 generator in phases 0-2, swept {0,0.005,0.02} in phase 3) maps the collapse threshold; ARM_4 floor-on (MECH-341/313). 5 conditions x 3 seeds, IGW-023 Phase-3 pressure. Supersedes 610e (confounded control).
items.note: Routed by failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-610e_2026-06-05 (confounded negative control). 610e was the FIRST harness-fixed crystallization run (policy genuinely trained, expansion stepped 1249 params, ewc_penalty in loss) but d2_control_shows_collapse=FALSE because MECH-313 noise floor + MECH-341 E3 score-diversity + the always-on policy entropy bonus held diversity up in BOTH arms -> INV-074's collapse-without-crystallization premise was never instantiated. 610f makes ARM_0 a TRUE NEGATIVE: (a) strip noise_floor + E3 score-diversity + dACC anti-recency suppression, and decouple structured curiosity from crystallize, in the stripped arms so the ONLY ARM_0-vs-ARM_1 difference is crystallize_at_phase3; (b) make the policy entropy bonus PHASE-DEPENDENT -- ENTROPY_BONUS_TRAIN=0.02 in phases 0-2 (every arm; generates the diversity so D3 sanity is non-vacuous + crystallization has something real to preserve) and SWEPT in phase 3 {ARM_0=0.0, ARM_2=0.005, ARM_3=0.02} to map where the control starts to collapse; (c) ARM_4 = stripped control + noise_floor + E3 score-diversity ON to test MECH-341/313's robust-floor reading honestly (the fork-c observation 610e could only note, now scored via D4). Carries forward the MANDATORY startup assertion (_assert_fixes_wired ERRORs the run if policy-train / expansion-step / ewc-penalty wiring is missing). Acceptance: D1 ARM_1.end_p3 - ARM_0.end_p3 >= +0.10; D2 ARM_0.end_p2 - ARM_0.end_p3 >= +0.10 (true-negative collapses); D3 both > 0.4 at phase2; PASS = D1 AND D2 AND D3. D4 ARM_4.end_p3 - ARM_0.end_p3 >= +0.10 scores MECH-341/313 (per-claim). evidence_direction_per_claim emitted (5 claims). Pre-registered fork: D2 FAIL with D3 holding = V3 policy not WTA-prone -> non_contributory-for-INV-074 (universal invariant NOT weakened), escalate Phase-3 pressure; D2 PASS + D1 FAIL = weakens MECH-334 -> /diagnose-errors. ~35h cloud run (610e actual ~142 min/run x 15 runs). 10th crystallization-arm result; FIRST with both harness fixed AND a genuine true-negative control.

items.title: modulatory-bias-selection-authority falsification (604a-based; authority OFF / gain0.5 / gain0.8). Does the gap-relative E3.select rescaling give MECH-314 curiosity (+ the full modulatory chain) genuine, bounded authority over the committed argmin? Diagnostic (claim_ids=[]). 3 arms x 3 seeds, identical curiosity-ALL_ON + MECH-341-entropy + SD-056 config; the ONLY difference is use_modulatory_selection_authority. The outstanding 'Next' in modulatory_bias_selection_authority_design.md.
items.note: Validation experiment for the modulatory-bias-selection-authority substrate (e3_selector.py:764-794, IMPLEMENTED 2026-06-03). experiment_purpose=diagnostic, claim_ids=[] -> not weighted in governance confidence/conflict; PASS is a SUBSTRATE gate that UNBLOCKS the per-claim evidence retests of MECH-314/MECH-320/MECH-341 + the GAP-2 scaffold-readiness run + the SD-057 cue-recall->approach-lift re-test (640a autopsy). NOT GAP-2-gated (criteria are bias telemetry + action-distribution, measurable in the standard 604a env). Addresses the 604a/624a/614d/640a drowning cluster (fixed ~0.05-0.1 modulatory biases never change an argmin whose raw_score_range is 2-5). PRE-REGISTERED ACCEPTANCE (per arm, PASS = each on >=2/3 seeds): C0 modulatory non-degeneracy ARM_B/C score_bias_abs_mean>1e-4 (else non_contributory: 'scaling zero is still zero', route to curiosity activation NOT authority falsification); C1 mechanism active ARM_A authority_active_frac~0 (flag OFF, bit-identical) AND ARM_B/C authority_active_frac>0.5 + scale_factor_mean>1.0; C2 authority real ARM_B/C bias_changed_selection_frac (selected_candidate_rank_before_bias>0) exceeds ARM_A by >0.05 AND observable action-distribution change (visited_cells/episode_length) vs ARM_A. C3 dose-response (C>B) informative. Overall PASS = C0 AND C1 AND C2. 604a STALE-KEY FIX: reads curiosity.get_state()['last_bias_max_abs'] (the real key; 604a read the nonexistent 'last_bias_abs_mean' -> structurally 0.0). Probe-verified pre-queue: ARM_A active=False/rank_before=0; ARM_B active=True/scale=48.5/rank_before=5; ARM_C rank_before=30. Smoke: --dry-run PASS end-to-end 9/9 cells (dry-scale FAIL expected at P0=2/P1=2). Substrate API identical across arms; harness reuses the 569d/604a SD-056 online-contrastive trainer.

items.title: Coherence-ablation REDESIGN: is C(tau) non-reducible to E(tau)? Supersedes V3-EXQ-641 per its confirmed failure-autopsy. Diagnostic (claim_ids=[]). Paired A/B harness ablation: arm A=argmin E, arm B=gap-relative coherence-weighted. L1: coherence read = cross-stream z_world<->z_self phase-alignment ONLY (641 temporal-smoothness term dropped -- it leaked E, seed-43 |corr|=0.70), E-orthogonalized (whitened) per candidate-pool; SPEC control = SHUFFLE-OF-REAL-C (contrast/distribution-shape matched), not 641's high-contrast uniform-random. L2: divergence measured on TWO-MODE-ACTIVE (>=2 first-action-class) P1 steps + raised to 6 seeds. L3: rebinding perturbation mag 0.20->0.50 + tie-tick boost 1.0 (641 had n_rebind=0 on all seeds). 3 conditions x 6 seeds.
items.note: Routed by failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-641_2026-06-06 (status: confirmed; user selected all three redesign levers). DIAGNOSTIC, experiment_purpose=diagnostic, claim_ids=[] -> not weighted in governance confidence/conflict. bears_on (NOT tagged): INV-002/ARC-018/MECH-061/MECH-269/MECH-270. Same scientific question as 641 (coherence non-reducibility) -> alphabetic suffix + supersedes V3-EXQ-641. Keeps the two 2026-04-23 intakes OPEN/gated (thought_intake binding + path_integral_constraints_search): this run decides them. ACCEPTANCE (per seed; PASS = D1 AND D3 AND SPEC on >=4/6 seeds): D1 frac_state_div_gated>=0.05 (two-mode-active steps); D3 |Spearman corr(E,rawC)|<0.90 (cross-stream-only read); SPEC real_C_clean.frac_state_div_gated >= shuffle_C_control.frac_state_div_gated + 0.05 (real beats a CONTRAST-MATCHED shuffle of the same coherence values). INTERPRETATION GRID: D1+D3+SPEC->register Q selection.coherence_nonreducibility + CLOSE both intakes positive + /implement-substrate wire C into E3.select; D1+D3-not-SPEC->C_changes_selection_specificity_unproven_route_followup (control now fair -> strong close signal, route /failure-autopsy); not-D1->F1 close intakes; not-D3->F2 close intakes. REBINDING sub-signal (n_rebind_under_perturb>0 on >=4/6) does NOT gate PASS -- feeds the binding intake; n_rebind still 0 -> binding axis under-instrumented, stays OPEN. Smoke: --dry-run PASS end-to-end 3/3 conditions (dry-scale FAIL/F1 expected at 1 seed). Harness-level ablation, no ree_core change; substrate API identical to 641 which ran 9/9.
